general_feedback: The single @return tag added at line 158 accurately describes what `computeHash` returns — the improved hash of `o` produced by `improveHash`, which XORs the original hash with its upper 16 bits (i.e., mixes high and low bits of `o.##`). The phrasing is clear, concise, uses backticks correctly for the `##` code reference, starts with lowercase, and is consistent with the existing `@param o` description above it.
